title: Initial Consultation
description: We begin with a free consultation to understand your vision, requirements, plot details, and budget. Our experts guide you through the possibilities.

title: Design & Planning
description: Our architects create detailed floor plans, 3D renders, and elevations. We iterate until every detail matches your dream. All government approvals and permits are handled by us.

title: Material Selection
description: Choose from our curated catalogue of tiles, fittings, paints, and finishes—or bring your own inspiration. We source premium materials at competitive prices.

title: Construction Begins
description: Your dedicated project manager oversees every stage—foundation, structure, plumbing, electrical—with weekly progress reports and site access for you.

title: Quality Inspection
description: Before handover, our quality team conducts a rigorous 100-point inspection. Any snags are resolved before you receive the keys.

title: Handover & After-Sales
description: We hand over your home with full documentation. Our after-sales team provides 2-year structural warranty and ongoing maintenance support.
